prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-KPL-SEMIHAULER-7PC-ASRTD Product Type: NON_RIDING_TOY_VEHICLE Brand (from catalog): Kidplokio Existing Title: Kidplokio 7pc Semi Truck Toy Vehicle Transporter with 6 Diecast Toy Cars Playset, Boys, Assorted Colors, Ages 3+ Description: Calling all little ones with a need for speed.

This awesome 7pc Semi Truck Toy Vehicle Transporter with 6 Diecast Cars Playset from Kidplokio comes with six diecast toy cars that can be easily tucked away into the sides of a larger semi truck transporter toy, making this a super fun 2 in 1 toy car. The larger semi truck toy features two plastic snap closure sidings to ensure all the toy cars stay together after playtime and don't get lost.

The semi hauler toy truck with toy cars is constructed of heavy-duty, durable plastic, meaning it can stand up to lots of everyday playtime wear and tear whether at home, traveling or out at play dates. In addition, playing with a manual truck toy can also help your little one use their imagination, encourage exploration and creativity, sharpen their motor skills and teach them to share with siblings, friends and schoolmates too.

With the toy trucks clever design and easy travel portability, hours of fun playtime for little ones and their friends or siblings await. No batteries or assembly required here.

PLEASE NOTE: Available colors (red or blue) ship AT RANDOM

Warning: Choking Hazard (small parts)

Recommended Ages: 3+ Search Terms: toys for boys brother hanukkah christmas gift cosplay roleplay stocking stuffers diecast cars race car truck toys holiday toy list 2022 travel toys fine motor toys Features: - SEMI TRUCK TOY: This awesome toy truck comes with x6 diecast cars that can be tucked away into the sides of the semi truck transporter toy; The semi truck toy features two plastic snap closure sidings to ensure all the piece stay together after playtime - PRETEND PLAY: With so many playing options available, kids will have hours of fun, racing cars and driving the large semi truck toy on its own too; this playset is also great for cognitive development as kids think up lots of pretend play scenarios, while also working their fine motor skills - TRAVEL FRIENDLY: Semi truck toy is constructed of durable plastic, meaning it can stand up to lots of wear and tear in the playroom! The sturdy plastic side snap closures and retractable carrier handle make this a great toy to travel with keeping all the components safe and secure - SPECIFICATIONS: 14 x 7 x 5 inches; Colors: Red or Blue (Ships at Random); Weight: 1.06lbs; Warning: Choking Hazard, small parts; Ages: 3+ - NOTE: AVAILABLE COLORS (RED OR BLUE) SHIP AT RANDOM === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
